help.body: Add participants, docs, and meeting language at start for better STT accuracy. Mic mode = self only; Web meeting mode separates channels (me/other). Question cards' 'Find answer' uses meeting docs first (RAG). You can also type questions directly — shown in primary language + translated to the secondary.
help.cuePrefill: Tell me how Q note start, recording mode, find-answer, and speaker recognition work

empty.title: Start a recording
empty.line1: Real-time speech recognition, translation, and question detection

prepared.hint: Press "Start Recording" to begin real-time speech recognition.

question.notFound: No answer found in registered materials.

popover.title: This person is
popover.hintRegister: Register participants when starting a meeting to select them here

selfMode.label: My speech
selfMode.hideTitle: Record and save my speech but hide it on screen

manualQuestion.placeholder: Type a question directly (any language OK — auto-translated to the meeting language)

readiness.allReady: ✓ All materials ready — you can start recording
readiness.hintLine1: You can manage materials, Q&A, and vocabulary from the "Settings" button.
readiness.hintLine2: Indexing may take 10 seconds to 1 minute depending on file size.

errors.reshareTab: Please re-share the tab audio. Make sure "Share tab audio" is checked in the share dialog.
errors.permissionDenied: Microphone or tab-share permission denied. Please allow it from the lock icon in the browser address bar.
errors.shareCancelled: Tab audio sharing was cancelled. When retrying, make sure "Share tab audio" is checked.
errors.serverConnection: Failed to connect to the Q note server. Please refresh and try again.
errors.recorderLocked: This meeting is already being recorded in another tab or device. Please pause or end it there first.
errors.recorderLost: Another tab took over the recording, so this tab has stopped.
errors.recorderLockedBanner: This meeting is being recorded in another tab or device. Duplicate recording is not allowed.

startModal.briefHint: Adding meeting purpose, caveats, and topics greatly improves translation, summary, and answer quality.
startModal.briefPlaceholder:
Example:
- Purpose: Investor pitch for a new SaaS product
- Materials: Pitch deck v3 attached
- Caveat: Revenue figures are under NDA
startModal.participantsHint: Enter individuals or groups. Used for speaker matching after the meeting.
startModal.translationHint: Sub-translation below each utterance. Default = your language ({{lang}}).
startModal.materialsHintLine1: "Find Answer" searches these materials first. If nothing is found, it falls back to general AI knowledge.
startModal.materialsHintLine2: <1>Prefer text or links.</1> Use files for small slides/docs.
startModal.materialsHintLine3: Max 10 MB per file · up to 5 files · PDF · DOCX · TXT · MD · text-based PDFs only (no scans)
startModal.dropzoneText: Drag & drop files or click to select
startModal.pastedPlaceholder:
Paste text copied from email, Notion, or a web page.
Can be used together with files.
startModal.urlPlaceholder: https://... (blog, public Notion page, PDF link, etc.)
startModal.urlHint: Only public pages can be auto-extracted. For private/login pages, paste the text directly.

fileError.tooMany: You can upload at most {{max}} files.
fileError.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://.

startModal.draftClearTitle: Clear the saved draft and start fresh

editBanner.body: — existing materials are safely stored in the DB.
editBanner.addHighlight: Items you add here are merged with existing materials
editBanner.removeHighlight: can be deleted individually via the ✗ button

priority.label: Q&A Materials (Answer priority #1)
priority.intro2: . Both file upload and manual input are supported.
priority.uploading: Uploading... (PDF/DOCX may take 20-30s via LLM extraction)
priority.dropHint: Drag & drop or click to select a file
priority.uploadNowSub: CSV · Excel · JSON · TXT · MD · PDF · DOCX — uploads immediately
priority.uploadLaterSub: CSV · Excel · JSON · TXT · MD · PDF · DOCX — uploads on meeting start
priority.templateDownload: Download sample CSV (columns can be named question/질문 · answer/답변 · short_answer · keywords · category — any variant OK)
priority.questionPlaceholder: Question (e.g. Why did you choose this topic?)
priority.answerPlaceholder: Exact answer (as you'd say it, length OK)
priority.shortAnswerPlaceholder: 1-sentence version (optional, used when answer length is 'short')

vocabulary.label: Vocabulary (STT correction)
vocabulary.hintStrong1: matched first by Deepgram during speech recognition
vocabulary.hintStrong2: Uploaded documents are the primary source
vocabulary.hintPart3: . They are re-extracted automatically once indexing finishes, or use "Re-extract from docs" below to pull them immediately.
vocabulary.refreshTitle: Re-extract vocabulary from currently indexed documents (manual keywords preserved)
vocabulary.empty: No auto-extracted vocabulary. Add manually below.
vocabulary.addPlaceholder: Add word/phrase (comma or Enter to add multiple)

answerStyle.label: Answer style · length
answerStyle.hint: Tune this if answers come out too long or too hard. The model adjusts to spoken-friendly words and language level.
answerStyle.stylePlaceholder: Example: Be concise and confident. No jargon. Include concrete numbers. Do not echo the question.
